chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-2527 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on MA-11410/19 3. For orders on MA-11411/19 4. For hearing of main case. 19.12.2019. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Sahito, advocate for petitioners. = The petitioners being employee(s) of Railway Police Pakistan have challenged their transfer before this Court by way of instant petition, which is incompetent in terms of Article-212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973. Consequently, it is dismissed along with listed applications, with advice to the petitioners to approach the Service Tribunal having jurisdiction for redressal of their grievance, if they desire to-do-so. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
